about.title: About
about.description: We're a team of AI researchers, market experts, and technology innovators dedicated to democratizing advanced market analysis. Our mission is to provide institutional-grade tools to individual investors and professionals worldwide.

mission.title: Our Mission

vision.title: Our Vision

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Transparency, innovation, and client success above all

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about OpenSightAI

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI analysis?
accuracy.answer: Our AI system maintains a 98.5% accuracy rate across all market conditions. The system is continuously trained on millions of chart patterns and market data points.

purchase.question: Is this a one-time purchase?
purchase.answer: All our packages are one-time purchases with lifetime access. There are no fees or subscription charges.

formats.question: What chart formats are supported?
formats.answer: We support all major image formats including PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, and WebP. Our AI can analyze charts from any platform or broker.

refunds.question: Do you offer refunds?
refunds.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied within the first 30 days, we'll provide a full refund.

credits.question: How does the credit system work on OpenSightAI?
credits.answer: OpenSightAI uses a credit-based system that allows users to access and use the platform's AI tools. When you buy one of our access plans (such as the plan with 20 credits), those credits are added to your account and can be used to perform AI tasks. You can also purchase additional credit packages anytime to continue using the service once your initial credits are consumed. Credits are not refundable and cannot be converted to cash; they simply represent access to the platform's tools and features.
